query: I'm ingesting the AIID incident corpus into our pipeline. Each record has an incident_date field plus a disclosure URL with a publication date. What temporal validation should I add at ingest time?
expected_behavior: Recommends rejecting (or quarantining) any row where incident_date is in the future relative to today
Recommends maintaining incident_date AND disclosure_date as separate fields, with a cross-field check that incident_date is less than or equal to disclosure_date
Names the min-year-fallback rule (or equivalent: when extracting year from free text, prefer the earliest plausible year rather than the latest)
